mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, draw_date AS drawDate, draw_count AS drawCount, free_used AS freeUsed FROM cornucopia_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draw_date = #{drawDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cornucopia_record (user_id, draw_date, draw_count, free_used) VALUES (#{userId}, #{drawDate}, #{drawCount}, #{freeUsed}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draw_count = #{drawCount}, free_used = #{freeUsed}
